title: Nantes vs Chambery - LNH Division 1 - French Handball Starligue
description: Dive into the excitement of French handball with Liqui Moly Starligue, formerly LNH Division 1. Established in 1952, this premier league event features 16 top teams battling for glory. With Montpellier’s 14 Handball titles and Paris Saint-Germains 11 wins, the competition is fierce. Champions earn spots in the EHF Champions League, while cup winners qualify for the European League.

title: Al Gharafa vs Al Wakrah - Amir Cup 2025/2026 - SF1
description: The Amir Cup is an association football tournament played every season by all first and second division teams in Qatar. Since its inception, the Amir Cup has been the dream of every player, team, coach, and club in Qatar. Al-Gharafa is the champion of 2025.

title: Al Sadd vs Al Duhail - Amir Cup 2025/2026 - SF2
description: The Amir Cup is an association football tournament played every season by all first and second division teams in Qatar. Since its inception, the Amir Cup has been the dream of every player, team, coach, and club in Qatar. Al-Gharafa is the champion of 2025.

title: Finals 1st leg - Marmara Spike ligue Volleyball - 2026
description: France’s top men’s volleyball competition, the LNV Ligue A Masculine (Marmara SpikeLigue), delivers a season of elite clubs battling through a home-and-away league before the playoffs.
